snippet.title: SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) | Puri Jagannadh | Vijay Sethupathi | Tabu | Samyuktha
snippet.description:
SlumDog - 33 Temple Road Teaser (Telugu) on Puri Jagannadh YouTube Channel.

SlumDog - 33 Temple Road is an upcoming gritty pan-India action drama which brings dashing director Puri Jagannadh and versatile actor Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi together for one of the most intriguing collaborations. Also co-stars Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay and others. Produced by Puri Jagannadh and Charmme Kaur under the Puri Connects banner, in collaboration with JB Narayan Rao Kondrolla's JB Motion Pictures. 

#PuriJagannadh #VijaySethupathi #SlumDog33TempleRoad #Tabu #Samyuktha #DuniyaVijay #CharmmeKaur #PuriConnects #LatestTeluguMovieTeasers #LatestTeluguMovies

Cast: Makkalselvan Vijay Sethupathi, Tabu, Samyuktha, Duniya Vijay Kumar, Zarina Wahab, VTV Ganesh, Brahmaji and Others.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Title Track | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Anu M, Javed - Mohsin, Sameer A
snippet.description:
Get ready to groove to the electrifying title track "Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai"! Packed with vibrant energy, catchy beats, and youthful romance, this song is the perfect celebration of love, fun, and unforgettable moments.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits : 
Track Name: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai 
Music Recreated by: Javed - Mohsin 
Additional Lyrics by: Mohsin Shaikh
Singers: Shankar Mahadevan & Hema Sardesai
Rap By Ranj & Earl Edgar
Original Music Composer: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics by: Sameer Anjaan

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP

Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar

Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd.

snippet.title: Son of Thanjai - Gameplay Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10008660

Step into the Chola dynasty. Son of Thanjai is an action-adventure game set in ancient South India, featuring the Surul Vaal, a flexible whip sword never before seen in gaming. Play as Vinnendiran, a fallen prince fighting to reclaim a throne through a land torn apart by invasion. Coming to PS5.

#ps5 #ps5games 

Rated Mature

snippet.title: Tanha Paya Khud Ko – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tanha Paya Khud Ko – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tanha paya khud ko…
tere jaane ke baad.

Jo dil kabhi
teri mohabbat se bhara tha…
aaj wahi
khamosh aur adhoora sa hai.

Humne socha tha
saath umr bhar rahega…
magar mohabbat bhi
ek din badal gayi.

“Tanha Paya Khud Ko”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ke bichhadne ke baad
khud se bhi door ho gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
yaadein bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

tere bina
humne khud ko tanha paya…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir uske bina jeena pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

Tanha paya khud ko…
tere jaane ke baad.

Jo dil kabhi
teri mohabbat se bhara tha…
aaj wahi
khamosh aur adhoora sa hai.

Humne socha tha
saath umr bhar rahega…
magar mohabbat bhi
ek din badal gayi.

“Tanha Paya Khud Ko”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo kisi ke bichhadne ke baad
khud se bhi door ho gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
yaadein bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

tere bina
humne khud ko tanha paya…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se chaha ho
aur phir uske bina jeena pada ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: BABYMONSTER - 'SUGAR HONEY ICE TEA' M/V
snippet.description:
SUGAR HONEY ICE TEA 

Who be sippin’ on this? I do
I’m the, I’m the, I’m the, I’m the

I’m the sugar honey ice tea and you know it
I’m the sugar honey ice tea and you know it
Ice, ice, ice and you know that I’m the coldest
I’m the sugar honey
I, I, I’m the sugar honey

I’m sweet just like some ice cream
Milk chocolate icing
My life look like a pipe dream
I know, I know, I know
I know I’m so enticing
I make ’em lime green
Temperature rising
Let’s go, let’s go, let’s go

snippet.title: Cocktail 2 Official Trailer | Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna | In Cinemas 19th June
snippet.description:
From friends to lovers to CHAOS, the perfect 🍸 is back.

#Cocktail2 In Cinemas 19th June. Trailer Out Now.

Directed By: Homi Adajania
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan, Ankur Garg
Music Director: Pritam
Written by: Tarun Jain, Luv Ranjan
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Story By: Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Production Design: Arvind Ashok Kumar, Bindiya Chhabria
Editor: Akshara Prabhakar
Associate Producers: Sanjeev Mishra, Vineeta Tanwar
Executive Director: Abhishek Kapur
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania
Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
Executive Producers: Shraddha S. Thorat, Roshan Singh
COO & Legal Head: Ashni Parekh
Head of Commercials & Distribution: Poonam Shivdasani
Finance Head: Anuradha Walawalkar
Sound Designer: Anirban Sengupta
Re-Recording Mixer: Rajakrishnan M. R
Associate Director (SICILY): Vikram Dawar
Chief Assistant Director: Priyansh Gabra
O.A.P: Lagnesh Joshi
Script Supervisor: Chitgunn Singh
Director's Assistant: Daani Naidu
Associate Line Producer: Hemant Dubey
Casting By: Panchami Ghavri
Secondary Costume Designer: Akshay Tyagi
Associate Costume Designer: Sukriti Grover
Post Production: The Post Co.
DI: Redefine
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
VFX Producer (Maddock): Kunal Jagdish Sodha
VFX: Squad VFX Pvt Ltd, Astra Studios
Music On: Universal Music
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-One)
Head Brand PR & Social: Sonia Huria
PR: Ritu Devnani (Butterfly Communications)
Local Line Producers: Turtle Films (Delhi), Singh Productions (Chandigarh), The Family SRL (Italy)
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

Licensed Song: Tum Hi Ho Bandhu
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
Lyricist: Irshad Kamil
Singers: Neeraj Shridhar and Kavita Seth
Label: Sony Music Entertainment India

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maddockfilms/
Twitter: https://x.com/MaddockFilms
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms
Threads: https://www.threads.net/@maddockfilms

uk.title: ГРА ПРО КОПАННЯ ЯМИ... 😱🤑
uk.description:
Підпишіться, щоб отримувати нові відео

🤗 Підпишіться на мене в Instagram: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Сподіваюся, вам сподобалося відео. Якщо так, поставте лайк та поділіться ним.

Застереження щодо авторських прав: згідно з розділом 107 Закону про авторське право 1976 року, допускається «добросовісне використання» для таких цілей, як критика, коментарі, репортажі новин, викладання, наукові дослідження, освіта та дослідження.

Добросовісне використання — це використання, дозволене законами про авторське право, яке в іншому випадку могло б бути порушенням.

iw.title: משחק על חפירת בור... 😱🤑
iw.description:
אנא הירשמו לסרטונים חדשים

🤗 עקבו אחריי באינסטגרם: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

אני מקווה שנהניתם מהסרטון, אם כן, אנא עשו לייק ושתפו את הסרטון.

הצהרת זכויות יוצרים תחת סעיף 107 לחוק זכויות היוצרים משנת 1976, מתירה "שימוש הוגן" למטרות כגון ביקורת, תגובות, דיווח חדשותי, הוראה, מלגות, חינוך ומחקר.

שימוש הוגן הוא שימוש המותר על פי חוקי זכויות יוצרים שאחרת עלול להוות הפרה.

Il fair use è un utilizzo consentito dalle leggi sul copyright che altrimenti costituirebbe una violazione.

Pernyataan Penafian Hak Cipta berdasarkan pasal 107 Undang-Undang Hak Cipta tahun 1976, izin diberikan untuk “penggunaan wajar” untuk tujuan seperti kritik, komentar, pelaporan berita, pengajaran, beasiswa, pendidikan, dan penelitian.

Penggunaan wajar adalah penggunaan yang diizinkan oleh undang-undang hak cipta yang mungkin dianggap melanggar hak cipta.

ko.title: 구멍 파기 게임... 😱🤑
ko.description:

🤗 인스타그램도 팔로우해주세요: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

영상이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요와 공유 부탁드립니다.

본 영상은 1976년 저작권법 제107조에 따라 비판, 논평, 뉴스 보도, 교육, 학술 연구 등의 목적으로 "공정 사용"이 허용됨을 명시합니다.

공정 사용은 저작권법에 의해 허용되는 사용으로, 그렇지 않을 경우 저작권 침해에 해당될 수 있습니다.

pa.title: ਟੋਇਆ ਪੁੱਟਣ ਵਾਲੀ ਇੱਕ ਗੇਮ... 😱🤑
pa.description:
ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੋਵੇਗੀ, ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਈ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ।

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਇਜਾਜ਼ਤ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

pl.title: GRA O KOPIENIU DOŁU... 😱🤑
pl.description:
Subskrybuj, aby oglądać nowe filmy.

🤗 Obserwuj mnie na Instagramie: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Mam nadzieję, że film Ci się spodobał, jeśli tak, polub go i udostępnij.

Zastrzeżenie dotyczące praw autorskich, zgodnie z sekcją 107 Ustawy o prawach autorskich z 1976 r., zezwala na „dozwolony użytek” w celach takich jak krytyka, komentarz, relacje prasowe, nauczanie, stypendia, edukacja i badania.

Dozwolony użytek to użycie dozwolone przez ustawy o prawach autorskich, które w innym przypadku mogłoby naruszać prawa autorskie.

Avertissement relatif au droit d'auteur : conformément à l'article 107 de la loi américaine sur le droit d'auteur de 1976, l'utilisation équitable est autorisée à des fins telles que la critique, le commentaire, le reportage, l'enseignement, l'érudition, l'éducation et la recherche.

L'utilisation équitable est une utilisation autorisée par la loi sur le droit d'auteur qui, autrement, constituerait une contrefaçon.

Отказ от ответственности за нарушение авторских прав в соответствии со статьей 107 Закона об авторских правах 1976 года: допускается «добросовестное использование» в таких целях, как критика, комментарии, новостные репортажи, преподавание, научные исследования, образование и исследования.

Добросовестное использование — это использование, разрешенное законом об авторских правах, которое в противном случае могло бы считаться нарушением.

إخلاء مسؤولية حقوق النشر: بموجب المادة 107 من قانون حقوق النشر لعام 1976، يُسمح بالاستخدام العادل لأغراض مثل النقد والتعليق والتغطية الإخبارية والتدريس والبحث العلمي والتعليم.

الاستخدام العادل هو استخدام مسموح به بموجب قوانين حقوق النشر، والذي قد يُعتبر انتهاكًا في غير هذه الحالة.

ml.title: കുഴിയെടുക്കുന്നതിനെക്കുറിച്ചുള്ള ഒരു ഗെയിം... 😱🤑
ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക

🤗 ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ നിങ്ങൾ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടുവെന്ന് ഞാൻ പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നു, ദയവായി വീഡിയോ ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

hi.title: गड्ढा खोदने वाला एक गेम... 😱🤑
hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें

🤗 मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक ऐसा उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

bn.title: গর্ত খোঁড়ার একটা খেলা... 😱🤑
bn.description:
নতুন ভিডিওর জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন

🤗 আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে। যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে, তবে অনুগ্রহ করে ভিডিওটি লাইক ও শেয়ার করুন।

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

ta.title: குழி தோண்டுவது பற்றிய ஒரு விளையாட்டு... 😱🤑
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்

🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்வி, ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

te.title: గొయ్యి తవ్వే ఆట... 😱🤑
te.description:
కొత్త వీడియోల కోసం దయచేసి సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకోండి

🤗 నన్ను ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో ఫాలో అవ్వండి: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, ఒకవేళ నచ్చితే, దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్యానం, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన వినియోగం"కు అనుమతి ఇవ్వబడింది.

న్యాయమైన వినియోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక వినియోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

snippet.title: Aaj Se Teri - Lyrical | Padman | Akshay Kumar & Radhika Apte | Arijit Singh | Amit Trivedi
snippet.description:
Singer - Arijit Singh
Music - Amit Trivedi
Lyricist - Kausar Munir

Crew Names:-
Produced & Arranged by - Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar 
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed by - Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai Assisted by : Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Mastered by - Donal Whelan, Masteringworld - U.K.
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:-
Programmed by Amit Trivedi, Gourab Dutta & Raja Rasaily
Dholak & Percussions - Sanket Naik  
Mandolin, Saz & Bouzouki - Tapas Roy  
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal

Cast - Akshay Kumar, Radhika Apte & Sonam Kapoor
Production House - Hope Production Pvt Ltd
Producer - Twinkle Khanna, SPE Films India, KriArj Entertainment, Cape Of Good Films & Hope Productions
Director - R Balki

Lyrics:
Mukhda -
Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…

Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…
Aaj Se Meri Saari Khushiyaan Teri Ho Gayi,
Aaj Se Tera Gum Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe Aaaaa….Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke Jhoomoonga…

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 2-
Tu Maange Sardi Mein Amiya, 
Jo Maange Garmi Mein Mungphaliyaan, 
Tu Baarish Mein Agar Keh De,
Ja Mere Liye Tu Dhoop Khila.

Toh Main Sooraj……. Toh Main Sooraj Ko Jhatak Doonga, 
Toh Main Saawan Ko Gatak Loonga,
Toh Saare Taaron Sang Chanda
Main Teri Goad Mein Rakh Doonga-

Bas Mere Liye Tu Khil Ke Kabhi Muskuraa Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Sadiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Pal Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tere Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwaabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se ……Tera Ho Gaya.

#PadmanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #AkshayKumarSongs #NewHindiSongs

#bollywoodlyricalsongs #trendingsongs #romanticsongs #newhindisongs #lyrical 

🔔 Subscribe to Bollywood Lyrical Songs and turn on notifications to enjoy daily lyrical song uploads and the latest Bollywood music updates.

Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe Aaaaa….Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke Jhoomoonga…

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 2-
Tu Maange Sardi Mein Amiya, 
Jo Maange Garmi Mein Mungphaliyaan, 
Tu Baarish Mein Agar Keh De,
Ja Mere Liye Tu Dhoop Khila.

Toh Main Sooraj……. Toh Main Sooraj Ko Jhatak Doonga, 
Toh Main Saawan Ko Gatak Loonga,
Toh Saare Taaron Sang Chanda
Main Teri Goad Mein Rakh Doonga-

Bas Mere Liye Tu Khil Ke Kabhi Muskuraa Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Sadiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Pal Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tere Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwaabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se ……Tera Ho Gaya.

#From #FromSeason4 #FromSeason4Episode8 #fromseason4trailer #Fromseason4fulltrailer #fromseason4trailerbreakdown #fromseason3 #Fromily #fromville #fromonmgm #fromtvseries #fromtvshow #fromseason4Episode8trailer #mgm #mgmplus #fromexplained #FromTrailer #FromEndingExplained #talisman #FromMonsters #FromSeason4Filming #themaninyellow #smiley #HaroldPerrineau #fromseason4teaser #storywalking #Anghkooey 

ਅਧਿਕਾਰਤ MGM ਪ੍ਰੈਸ ਰਿਲੀਜ਼ ਫੋਟੋਆਂ
https://press.amazonmgmstudios.com/us/en/mgm-plus-series/from/4

ਜੇਰੇਮੀ ਆਈਸ ਐਂਡ ਫਾਇਰ 33 ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ ਜਿੱਥੇ ਅਸੀਂ ਹਾਊਸ ਆਫ਼ ਦ ਡਰੈਗਨ, 28 ਸਾਲ ਬਾਅਦ, ਸੇਵਰੈਂਸ, FROM, ਤੋਂ ਹਿੱਟ ਟੀਵੀ ਸੀਰੀਜ਼ ਅਤੇ ਫਿਲਮਾਂ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਸ਼੍ਰੇਣੀ ਨੂੰ ਕਵਰ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ। ਸ਼ੋਗੁਨ ਅਤੇ ਹੋਰ! ਲਾਈਵ ਵਾਚ ਪਾਰਟੀਆਂ ਅਤੇ ਚੈਨਲ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਲਈ ਸਾਡੇ ਡਿਸਕਾਰਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਹੋਵੋ, ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ! 🧙🏻‍♂️

FROM സീസൺ 4 എപ്പിസോഡ് 8 ഔദ്യോഗിക ട്രെയിലർ 
#From #FromSeason4 #FromSeason4Episode8 #fromseason4trailer #Fromseason4fulltrailer #fromseason4trailerbreakdown #fromseason3 #Fromily #fromville #fromonmgm #fromtvseries #fromtvshow #fromseason4Episode8trailer #mgm #mgmplus #fromexplained #FromTrailer #FromEndingExplained #talisman #FromMonsters #FromSeason4Filming #themaninyellow #smiley #HaroldPerrineau #fromseason4teaser #storywalking #Anghkooey 

ഔദ്യോഗിക MGM പ്രസ്സ് റിലീസ് ഫോട്ടോകൾ

அதிகாரப்பூர்வ MGM பத்திரிக்கை வெளியீட்டு புகைப்படங்கள்
https://press.amazonmgmstudios.com/us/en/mgm-plus-series/from/4

ஜெர்மி ஐஸ் & ஃபயர் 33-க்கு வரவேற்கிறோம். இங்கு நாங்கள் ஹவுஸ் ஆஃப் தி டிராகன், 28 இயர்ஸ் போன்ற பலதரப்பட்ட வெற்றி பெற்ற தொலைக்காட்சித் தொடர்கள் மற்றும் திரைப்படங்களைப் பற்றி விவாதிக்கிறோம். Later, Severance, FROM, Shōgun மற்றும் பல! நேரலை காணொளிக் காட்சிகள் மற்றும் சேனல் புதுப்பிப்புகளுக்கு எங்கள் டிஸ்கார்டில் இணையுங்கள், அனைவரும் வரவேற்கப்படுகிறார்கள்! 🧙🏻‍♂️

snippet.title: Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai | Udit Narayan | Jaanwar (1999) | Evergreen Emotional Hit
snippet.description:
Relive the emotional magic of "Tujhko Na Dekhun To Ji Ghabarata Hai" from the blockbuster movie Jaanwar (1999). Featuring Akshay Kumar and Master Aditya Kapadia, this heart-touching song is beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Sunidhi Chauhan. With melodious music by Anand-Milind and heartfelt lyrics by Sameer, this timeless 90s classic continues to win hearts.

snippet.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
snippet.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

hi.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
hi.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

snippet.title: Hil Pori Hila | Bhau Kadam | Gautami Patil | Rohit Raut | Sonali Sonawane | Prasad Shirsath
snippet.description:
The legendary Marathi chartbuster Hil Pori Hila is back with a fresh twist! Bringing together nostalgia, electrifying beats, and power-packed performances by Bhau Kadam and Gautami Patil, this vibrant recreation is guaranteed to get you dancing. Turn up the volume and join the celebration! 🎶

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

Audio Credits:
Singers: Rohit Raut & Sonali Sonawane 
Composer : Prasad Shirsath 
Music Arranged, Produced & Conducted by Prasad Ravindra Shirsath
Lyrics: Smita Kulkarni & Prasad Shirsath
Programming: Ayush Raut
Dholki: Parth Padekar
Chorus: Ganesh Bagul, Ashutosh Suryawanshi, Anupam Chinchore, Rushi Narvekar & Malhar Beloshe
Scratch Vocal: Tushar Londhe

localized.title: Hil Pori Hila | Bhau Kadam | Gautami Patil | Rohit Raut | Sonali Sonawane | Prasad Shirsath
localized.description:
The legendary Marathi chartbuster Hil Pori Hila is back with a fresh twist! Bringing together nostalgia, electrifying beats, and power-packed performances by Bhau Kadam and Gautami Patil, this vibrant recreation is guaranteed to get you dancing. Turn up the volume and join the celebration! 🎶

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

snippet.title: Bewajah - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Sanam Teri Kasam | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Experience the emotional track “Bewajah” in 8K/4K quality from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam, featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane. 

#bewajah #8k #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #himeshreshammiya #sanamterikasam #sadlovesongs #8kvideo

Credits:
Song: Bewajah
Singer: Himesh Reshammiya
Composer: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Yaadon ki qaid mein
Geeraftaar ho gaya dil
Darbadar ishq mein
Taar taar ho gaya dil (x2)
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Yaadon ki qaid mein
Giraftaar ho gaya dil
Darbadar ishq mein
Taar taar ho gaya dil
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Kisi aur ko tu chaahe
Kisi aur ko tu soche
Iss dil ko nahi ye gawara hai
Furqat ka sharara hai
Kaisa angara hai
Teri tishngi ne mujhe maara hai
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Rahe saath adhoorapan
Chaahe main jahaan bhi rahoon
Kahin sabr na mujhe aata hai
Meri berang duniya mein
Mere saath tera hona
Mujhe raahat kyun de jaata hai
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Yaadon ki qaid mein
Giraftaar ho gaya dil
Darbadar ishq mein
Taar taar ho gaya dil
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..
Bewajah nahi milna tera mera
Rehnuma, rehnuma, rehnuma..

Lyrics: Sameer

snippet.title: శ్రీ రేణుక ఎల్లమ్మ తల్లి భక్తి పాటలు వింటే చాలు కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం🙏 | Yellamma Folk Songs In Telugu
snippet.description:
శ్రీ రేణుక ఎల్లమ్మ తల్లి భక్తి పాటలు వింటే చాలు కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం🙏 | Yellamma Folk Songs In Telugu


Listen to the divine Sri Renuka Yellamma Thalli Bhakti Songs (శ్రీ రేణుక ఎల్లమ్మ తల్లి భక్తి పాటలు) 🙏. These powerful Yellamma Folk Songs in Telugu are filled with devotion and spiritual energy, believed to bring wealth, prosperity, and happiness into your life.

These traditional Telugu folk devotional songs are filled with deep devotion and spiritual energy. Listening to Sri Renuka Yellamma Thalli Bhakti Patalu is believed to bring immense punya (divine merit), remove negativity, and fulfill wishes.


#Yellamma #RenukaYellamma #YellammaFolkSongs #TeluguBhaktiSongs
#TelanganaFolkSongs #FolkSongs

te.description:
శ్రీ రేణుక ఎల్లమ్మ తల్లి భక్తి పాటలు వింటే చాలు కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం🙏 | Yellamma Folk Songs In Telugu


Listen to the divine Sri Renuka Yellamma Thalli Bhakti Songs (శ్రీ రేణుక ఎల్లమ్మ తల్లి భక్తి పాటలు) 🙏. These powerful Yellamma Folk Songs in Telugu are filled with devotion and spiritual energy, believed to bring wealth, prosperity, and happiness into your life.

These traditional Telugu folk devotional songs are filled with deep devotion and spiritual energy. Listening to Sri Renuka Yellamma Thalli Bhakti Patalu is believed to bring immense punya (divine merit), remove negativity, and fulfill wishes.

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

👉 LIVE में जुड़ो और देखो कौन सी कार सबसे ज्यादा स्ट्रॉन्ग है!

🔥 Don’t forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: Gup Chup Gup Chup - Lyrica | Karan Arjun | Mamta Kulkarni | Alka Yagnik & Ila Arun | Bollywood Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Mujhko Rana Ji Maaf Karna
Movie: Karan Arjun
Singer(s) : Ila Arun, Alka Yagnik
Music Director : Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist : Indeevar

Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Toone Kiya Nahi Kuch Vaisa 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Mukhade Pe Tere Sach Ka Ujaala 
Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | SURVIVAL STAGE | Day 4 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

It all comes down to this! Day 4 of the Survival Stage in BMPS 2026.

All 32 teams, divided into 4 groups, return with one goal - secure a spot in the Semi Finals.

No second chances, no room for error, every point gained or lost could decide the fate of a team. Only the Top 8 will advance, while the remaining 24 face elimination.
Expect calculated aggression, clutch moments, and teams pushing their limits to stay in the hunt ⚔️🔥

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹2Cr++

Featuring full Bangla voiceover and cinematic editing, this episode delivers suspense, exploration, mystery solving, and exciting discoveries.

snippet.title: JORDAN SANDHU: DASTAAR ANTHEM | TARSEM JASSAR | Mandeep Maavi | Trending Punjabi Song 2026 #trending

The pride of Punjab, the honor of Sikhi, and the symbol of identity — Dastaar Anthem is a powerful tribute to the rich heritage, courage, and values represented by the Dastaar. Featuring the soulful voice of Jordan Sandhu and the inspiring presence of Tarsem Jassar, this anthem celebrates tradition, respect, and cultural pride.
DASTAAR RELEASING IN CINEMAS ON 17th July, 2026✨

Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

Dine aa satkaar bada
Safe kina zyada feel hove

Puch leyo abdaali gajniya nu 
Akh rakhan na dinde naara te

Duniya maan kare sardaara te
Pagg nayari duniya toh 
Duniya maan kare sardaara te

Pagg taj vi hai garoor vi hai

snippet.title: Shararat - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat - this one’s made for the dance floor.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan

snippet.title: Tumsa Koi Pyaara - Lyrical | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik | Khuddar (1994)
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tumsa Koi Pyaara
Movie: Khuddar (1994)
Singer(s): Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Rahat Indori

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: N. R. Pachisia
Director: Iqbal Durrani
Cast: Govinda, Karisma Kapoor, Kader Khan, Shakti Kapoor

Song Lyrics:

Barsat Ka Mausam Yahan Hum Yahan Tum
Sajni Ko Milgaye Saajan Saajan Saajan
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum
Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yahan
Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakhon Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Haseen Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhen Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masoom Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Sau Phool Khile Jab Ye Khila Roop Sunhara
Sau Chand Bane Jab Ye Bana Chand Sa Chehra
Itna Bhi Koi Pyar Ki Raho Mein Ghoom Na Ho
Bas Hosh Hai Itna Mere Saath Mein Tum Ho
Mere Saath Me Tum Ho, Mere Saath Me Tum Ho
Dhadkan Hai Kahin Dil Hai Kahin Jaan Kahin Hai
Tum Jaan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Chandani In Ankhon Ka Saya To Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Ye Hoth Ye Palke Ye Nighahe Ye Adaye
Miljaye Khuda Mujhko Toh Main Lelu Balaaye
Duniya Ka Koi Bhi Gham Mere Paas Na Hoga
Tum Saath Mein Chaloge Toh Ye Ehsaas Na Hoga
Ehsaas Na Hoga, Ehsaas Na Hoga
Akash Hai Pairon Mein Hamare Ke Zameen Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Aisa Koi Mahbub Jamane Me Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Lakho Hai Magar Tumsa Yaha Kaun Hasi Hai
Tum Jan Ho Meri Tumhein Maloom Nahi
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai
Tumsa Koi Pyara Koi Masum Nahi Hai
Kya Cheez Ho Tum Khud Tumhein Maloom Nahi Hai

#TumsaKoiPyara #Govinda #KarismaKapoor #KaderKhan #ShaktiKapoor #Khuddar #KumarSanu #AlkaYagnik #AnandMilind #TumsaKoiPyaraKoiMasumNahiHai

Chahat Ko Tum Zinda Rakhna, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

বন্ধুরা, আমাকে এখানে ইন্সটাগ্রামে ফলো করুন - https://www.instagram.com/shivang_ranjan41/

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

যেকোনো সমস্যা সম্পর্কে আমাদের এখানে ইমেল করতে পারেন - shivangcare@gmail.com

Download links are provided below.

snippet.title: ప్రతిరోజు శివుని పాటలు వింటే కష్టాలు మీ దరికి చేరవు! | Lingashtakam  | Shiva Songs Telugu
snippet.description:
ప్రతిరోజు శివుని పాటలు వింటే కష్టాలు మీ దరికి చేరవు! | Lingashtakam  | Shiva Songs Telugu

Experience the divine power of Lord Shiva through these powerful and soothing Shiva Bhakti Songs, featuring the sacred Lingashtakam Telugu. Lord Shiva is the destroyer of negativity and the source of peace, strength, and spiritual transformation.

Listening to Lingashtakam and Shiva devotional songs on Mondays is considered highly auspicious. It is believed to remove obstacles, reduce stress, and bring peace, prosperity, and positive energy into life. The sacred vibrations of these chants help purify the mind and elevate spiritual consciousness.

snippet.title: Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ | Lord Shiva Kannada Devotional Songs | Shiva Haadugalu
snippet.description:
Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ | Lord Shiva Kannada Devotional Songs | Shiva Haadugalu


Listen to the soulful and divine Sojugada Sooju Mallige | ಸೋಜುಗಾದ ಸೂಜುಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ, one of the most popular Lord Shiva Kannada Devotional Songs (Shiva Haadugalu) that touches the heart of every devotee.

This powerful song glorifies Lord Shiva (Mahadeva / Shambho) and is widely loved for its deep spiritual meaning and devotional feel. Devotees believe that listening to Shiva songs brings peace, removes negativity, and fills life with divine blessings and positivity.

This collection of Kannada Shiva devotional songs is perfect for daily prayers, meditation, Monday special worship, and spiritual upliftment. Let the divine vibrations of Shiva Bhakti Geethegalu fill your life with peace, strength, and devotion.

🙏 Om Namah Shivaya
🙏 Hara Hara Mahadeva

O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
